title: Stylish Discs
description: Updating the Minecraft Disc textures to feel more modern and add a touch of life to make them different, while still feeling vanilla
body:
- The 19 current Minecraft music discs updated to have textures that are more in line with Jappa's style
- Some include special little details and easter eggs ;)
- I plan on keeping this pack updated as new discs are added
- NOW INCLUDES: "Tears - Amos Roddy" and "Lava Chicken - Hyper Potion"
